stories.headline: Aave hits 80% of $200M Kelp DAO bailout — Mantle, Aave DAO put up $127M
stories.tldr: Aave's recovery fund has raised nearly 80% of the $200M needed to cover bad debt left by the Kelp DAO exploit, led by Mantle and Aave DAO contributions.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A successful private bailout could become DeFi's playbook for absorbing nine-figure exploits without protocol insolvency or token death spirals.
the_details: Mantle and Aave DAO combined for $127M of the funds raised so far toward the $200M target.
Funds will plug bad debt left after the April 19 Kelp hack drained ~116,500 rsETH (~$292M).
Roughly $40M still needs to come from external contributors before the recovery completes.

stories.headline: BTC whales flip aggressively long on Hyperliquid as funding stays deeply negative
stories.tldr: Hyperliquid whale positioning has pushed firmly net long despite negative funding, coinciding with bitcoin's grind from the mid-$60Ks back near $80,000.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Aggressive whale longs paired with deeply negative funding is historically a contrarian setup that has preceded sharp upside short squeezes.
the_details: Whale long bias intensified through April after flipping from net short in early March.
BTC tagged near $80,000 this week before pulling back into the $77K region.
Funding rates remain deeply negative — retail still positioned short into the strength.

stories.headline: Grayscale and Bitmine stake nearly $500M ETH in single-day institutional flex
stories.tldr: Grayscale and Bitmine combined to stake roughly $500M of ETH on April 25, deepening institutional commitment to Ethereum's native yield.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Half-billion-dollar single-day stakes from regulated entities tighten ETH float and tilt the validator set further toward TradFi balance sheets.
the_details: Combined ~$500M staked on April 25 across Grayscale and Bitmine treasuries.
Spot ETH ETFs simultaneously logged $23.4M net inflows, reversing a brief outflow trend.
Move lands as Standard Chartered tags 2026 as 'the year of Ethereum' on relative fundamentals.

stories.headline: BTC-dollar correlation deepens to -0.90 — most negative since 2022
stories.tldr: Bitcoin's 30-day correlation with the U.S. Dollar Index has deepened to -0.90, the most negative reading in nearly four years.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: An extreme inverse correlation cements BTC's macro role as the anti-dollar trade, leaving it directly tethered to Fed and Treasury moves.
the_details: BTC up 13%+ in April, on pace for its best monthly performance in a year.
USDT supply expansion to ~$150B has added liquidity behind the rebound.

stories.headline: Spot SOL ETFs blow past $1B AUM as Goldman Sachs surfaces as major holder
stories.tldr: Spot Solana ETFs have crossed $1 billion in assets under management, with Goldman Sachs disclosed among the major position holders.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Goldman entering size on a SOL ETF mints Solana as a TradFi-grade allocation alongside BTC and ETH, expanding institutional altcoin pipes.
the_details: Combined spot SOL ETF AUM topped $1B in late April 2026.
Goldman Sachs disclosed among the major institutional holders.
SOL is consolidating $77–$94 with the weekly chart flashing a rare bullish crossover.
